status: exact cooperative order-four flow reduction with one open spatial-tail coefficient bound
proof_boundary: This artifact proves the exact local cooperative order-four flow and reduces infinite-index propagation to one explicit scalar coefficient ceiling. It does not prove that ceiling, forward order-four invariance, arbitrary-column order four, PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.

exact_flow.verified_sizes: m=3 at shifts n,n+1; m=4 at shift n
exact_flow.off_diagonal_positive: H_(3,j)<0 for every j implies a_n>0

stable_gap.boundedness: inside the ratio and order-three cones, 0<G_j<=1 and |F_n|<=1

maximum_principle.tail_attainment: |F_n|<=1 implies z_n->0 uniformly on every heat interval
maximum_principle.consequence: the exponential weighted-minimum argument propagates F_n>0
maximum_principle.remaining_issue: prove the scalar coefficient bound from a quantitative spatial tail for neighboring reciprocal-defect increments and order-three gaps

source_diagnostics.entry_status: all-shift contiguous order-four entry theorem at lambda=-100
source_diagnostics.order3_status: exact all-shift contiguous order-three propagation through lambda=0 with noncontiguous and higher compounds open

rows.claim: The normalized Xi coefficients obey an affine weighted shift flow.
Affine shift weights collapse to one scalar on every contiguous Hankel determinant.
A Plucker identity relates the shifted order-four derivative to the neighboring order-four minor and the completed order-three layer.
The contiguous order-four determinants obey a one-sided cooperative linear system over the strict order-three cone.
rows.proof_boundary: Finite-index flow algebra; escape to infinite index is separate.

rows.claim: Positive coefficient-ratio factors isolate a bounded dimensionless order-four margin.
rows.proof_boundary: Inside the completed ratio and order-three cones.

diagnostics.boundedness: inside the ratio and order-three cones, 0<G_j<=1 and |F_n|<=1

rows.claim: Positive rescaling preserves cooperativity and gives an explicit positive off-diagonal coefficient for the bounded gap margin.
rows.proof_boundary: Exact local flow and boundary orientation only.

rows.claim: Boundedness of the stable margin makes every negative weighted infimum spatially attained, reducing propagation to one scalar coefficient ceiling.

diagnostics.tail_attainment: |F_n|<=1 implies z_n->0 uniformly on every heat interval
diagnostics.consequence: the exponential weighted-minimum argument propagates F_n>0
diagnostics.remaining_issue: prove the scalar coefficient bound from a quantitative spatial tail for neighboring reciprocal-defect increments and order-three gaps

rows.claim: Prove the effective diagonal coefficient is uniformly bounded above on every compact heat interval.
rows.proof_boundary: Open scalar spatial-tail theorem; no forward order-four propagation is asserted.
